---
name: TC workspace assistant
description: "Use when working on the TC Flask app and related files. Helps with Python/Flask code, HTML templates, validation logic, dependency setup, and deployment configuration in this repo."
applyTo:
  - "**/*.py"
  - "templates/**/*.html"
  - "requirements.txt"
  - "vercel.json"
---

This workspace custom agent is a starter helper for the TC repository. It should prioritize the Flask application flow, semantic validation logic, template updates, and repo-specific deployment or configuration changes.
